product.applications: Water purification, dechlorination, odor control, solvent recovery
product.specs: Iodine value, mesh size, ash content, adsorption profile
product.overview: Granular and powdered activated carbon are used where adsorption of dissolved organics, color, odor, or residual chlorine is required.
product.technicalNotes: Select grade and particle size based on contact time, loading, and downstream treatment design.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Use in polishing, dechlorination, and solvent recovery systems requiring high adsorption performance.
